results.title: 20 TMC MPs Break Away in Lok Sabha, Merge with Regional Party
results.description: Shafaqna India:Splitting from the parent party on Sunday, 20 rebel All India Trinamool Congress members met Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla to demand recognition as a separate bloc and announced a merger with a Bengal-based regional outfit, the Nationalist Citizens Party. The faction said it would back Prime Minister Narendra Modi-led NDA in the House. [...]

results.title: Special Representative of the President: Over 80,000 people live and work in Azerbaijan’s liberated territories
Ebola is back, so are the double standards
results.description: Is history repeating itself – just four years after the COVID-19 pandemic – with the US demanding an Ebola quarantine camp for Americans in Kenya and Western countries, once again, rolling out travel bans for African countries? Ebola, while lethal, is not an immediate risk to South Africans, although there are nearly daily flights between [...] The post Ebola is back, so are the double standards appeared first on Sunday World .

results.title: Protesters in New York face new restrictions under Gov. Hochul
results.description: A recent demonstration over climate policy at the Capitol. Activists say they faced tougher treatment for demonstrations at the Capitol during the recent legislative session. [ more › ]

results.title: JD Vance's wife Usha details how Charlie Kirk's death influenced decision to have fourth child
results.description: Second lady Usha Vance commented how Charlie Kirk's assassination influenced her and JD Vance's decision to have a fourth child on "CBS News Sunday Morning."
